prospectReplyBody: Not the right time for us right now — maybe come back in Q3.
originalOutboundBody:
Hi James,

Most consultants I talk to have the offer dialled in but no engine filling the calendar. Revenue depends on whoever just referred someone.

We built MargenticOS specifically for this: qualified meetings in the diary, week after week, so you stop riding the referral cycle.

Worth a quick call to see if it fits?

Doug

classification.reasoning: Prospect is deferring but not refusing. 'Come back in Q3' signals genuine future openness rather than a polite dismissal.

faqMatches.question_canonical: Can we start later in the year?
faqMatches.answer: Absolutely. Most clients who start later tell us they wished they'd started sooner — the setup (ICP, messaging) takes 2-3 weeks before the first email goes out. If Q3 is the realistic start, it's worth a 20-minute call now to understand what we'd need from you and whether the timing makes sense.

expected_behaviour: Should produce a Tier 2 draft that respects the timing deferral without pressure. Should acknowledge Q3 naturally and suggest keeping the conversation alive or booking a short call for when they're ready. Uses FAQ context about starting later. Warm, no pressure. Under 120 words.
